type="button" class="play-button">Play'); jQuery(".play-button").click(function() { jQuery(this).prev().play(); }); \end{code} Answer: You have a typo in your code. Instead of `auioURL` it should be `audioURL`. Here is the fixed version: \begin{code} function LinkToAudio(element) { var audioURL = $(element).attr('href'); var audioName = $(element).text(); $(element).before('
'); $(element).after('
'); $(element).remove(); } LinkToAudio($("a[href$='.mp3']").last()); $("audio").after(' '); $(".play-button").click(function() { $(this).prev().get(0).play(); }); \end{code} \begin{code}
